content:
- Continued task 10a from TO BE VERIFIED, performed deep skeptical verification with broad parallel repository audit, and altered the plan (added HA e2e direct-path bypass remediation and explicit test-real suite coverage).
- Implemented centralized real-binary policy in src/test_harness/binaries.rs with PGTUSKMASTER_REQUIRE_REAL_BINARIES parsing, require-or-skip wrappers, and new policy unit tests.
- Migrated real-binary tests in src/test_harness/pg16.rs, src/test_harness/etcd3.rs, src/pginfo/worker.rs, src/process/worker.rs, and src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs to shared helper behavior; removed HA e2e direct .tools path checks in favor of helper-based resolution.
- Added Makefile test-real target with enforced env and explicit real suites; documented prerequisites and enforced-vs-default flow in RUST_SYSTEM_HARNESS_PLAN.md.
- Ran gates with evidence in .ralph/evidence/10a-enforce-real-binaries/gates: make check, make test (first run failed with stale archive missing object; recovered via cargo clean and reran successfully), make test-bdd, make lint, make test-real; also captured acceptance grep artifacts for make test/lint phrases.
- Updated task 10a status/checklist to done/passing, added a durable learning to AGENTS.md, and ran .ralph/task_switch.sh.
- Next step before quitting: commit all touched files (including .ralph updates and evidence artifacts) with required message format.
